mapper.select: SELECT vocabulary.id ,vocabulary.book_id ,vocabulary.word ,vocabularyBook.name ,card.good ,card.bad ,vocabulary.user_id ,vocabulary.definition FROM vocabulary LEFT JOIN card ON vocabulary.id = card.id LEFT JOIN vocabularyBook ON vocabulary.book_id = vocabularyBook.id WHERE vocabulary.user_id = #{userId} AND vocabulary.book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1

SELECT vocabulary.id ,vocabulary.book_id ,vocabulary.word ,vocabularyBook.name ,vocabulary.user_id ,vocabulary.definition FROM vocabulary LEFT JOIN vocabularyBook ON vocabulary.book_id = vocabularyBook.id WHERE vocabulary.user_id = #{userId} AND vocabulary.book_id = #{bookId}

SELECT vocabulary.id ,vocabulary.book_id ,vocabulary.word ,card.good ,card.bad ,vocabulary.user_id ,vocabulary.definition FROM vocabulary LEFT JOIN card ON vocabulary.id = card.id WHERE vocabulary.id = #{id}
SELECT count(word) FROM vocabulary WHERE word =#{word} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id ,book_id ,word ,user_id ,definition FROM vocabulary WHERE vocabulary.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id ,book_id ,word ,user_id ,definition FROM vocabulary WHERE vocabulary.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 3
SELECT id ,book_id ,word ,user_id ,definition FROM vocabulary WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 3

SELECT vocabulary.id ,vocabulary.book_id ,vocabulary.word ,vocabularyBook.name ,vocabulary.user_id ,vocabulary.definition FROM vocabulary LEFT JOIN vocabularyBook ON vocabulary.book_id = vocabularyBook.id WHERE vocabulary.book_id = #{bookId}

SELECT vocabulary.id ,vocabulary.book_id ,vocabulary.word ,vocabulary.user_id ,vocabulary.definition ,subscribeBook.user_id ,subscribeBook.book_id FROM vocabulary LEFT JOIN subscribeBook ON vocabulary.book_id = subscribeBook.book_id WHERE subscribeBook.user_id = #{userId} AND subscribeBook.book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 3
